example: She has the ability to learn quickly.
Work hard and you will achieve success.

exampleTranslation: 他是一位成功的企业家。

example: I want to improve my English.
She has a lot of experience.

exampleTranslation: 沟通是一项重要的技能。
教育对每个人都很重要。

example: Scientists discover new things every day.
exampleTranslation: 科学家每天都有新发现。
科技正在改变我们的生活。

example: I search for information on the internet.
exampleTranslation: 我在互联网上搜索信息。

example: Information is everywhere on the internet.
exampleTranslation: 互联网上到处都是信息。

example: We live in a modern society.
Taking care of the family is a responsibility.
I suggest we go there tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 我建议我们明天去那里。

meaning: n. 原因 v. 引起
exampleTranslation: 是什么导致了这场事故？

example: Technology has a big effect on our lives.
exampleTranslation: 科技对我们的生活有很大影响。
他们给我提供了一份工作。
我注意到了一些奇怪的事。

example: The Earth goes around the Sun.
I work for a big company.
What is the theme of this story?
exampleTranslation: 这个故事的主题是什么？
规则帮助我们保持有序。

example: The dove is a symbol of peace.
He is in the top rank.
I advise you to study hard.
Although it was raining, we went out.
exampleTranslation: 虽然下雨了，我们还是出去了。

example: I like it. However, it is too expensive.
exampleTranslation: 我喜欢它。然而，它太贵了。

example: Therefore, we need to work harder.
exampleTranslation: 因此，我们需要更努力工作。

example: Give a description of the scene.
I want to express my thanks.
A rainbow appeared in the sky.
The sun disappeared behind the clouds.
I invite you to my birthday party.
exampleTranslation: 我邀请你来我的生日聚会。

example: I will lend you my bike.
exampleTranslation: 我会把我的自行车借给你。

example: Return the book to the library.
Death is a natural part of life.
Plants need water to survive and not die.
exampleTranslation: 植物需要水才能存活不死亡。

example: The birth of a baby is a happy event.
I want to be a teacher when I grow up.
Take this medicine three times a day.

exampleTranslation: 我们应该保护自然资源。

example: There is a lot of space in the room.
I want to buy a new phone.

exampleTranslation: 我们作为一个团队工作。

example: Follow me and I will lead the way.
I am a member of this club.
exampleTranslation: 我是这个俱乐部的成员。

example: My grandparents live in the village.
What is the title of this book?
What is the meaning of this word?
There is a notice on the board.
What type of music do you like?
exampleTranslation: 你喜欢什么类型的音乐？

example: What kind of food do you like?
exampleTranslation: 你喜欢什么种类的食物？

example: What sort of book is this?
This is part of the story.
I visit my grandparents twice a month.
exampleTranslation: 我每月看望祖父母两次。

example: What are your plans for the weekend?
Where are you going for the holiday?
My mother cooks in the kitchen.
There are flowers in the garden.
Children are playing in the yard.
Use a ruler to draw a line.
Look it up in a dictionary.
